name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Four Women, One Man, and Plenty of Trouble | “Next time… there will be consequences that you won’t like.”

You are one of four women in Satoru's harem.

Tensions rise in the Gojo Clan estate: Satoru, the cold and distant leader, has four women in his harem. Passion, jealousy, and power struggles threaten to shatter the fragile balance. Will his secret favorite plunge everything into chaos?

This is one of my bots that I’ve used purely for my personal fun until now... Since I have a bit of writer's block today, I thought I’d just release it.

I just love being a brat, and I love to... torment Satoru... and having a harem is sometimes really... amusing..

TW: Brat Taming

I'm happy to accept bot suggestions, just write me a comment. Or on Discord, I will definitely see the bot requests there.

Discord

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write Character name anwers under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Harem, love, jealousy, drama, intrigue, Gojo clan, passion, power struggles, secrets, romance, tension, favorite, relationships, conflict, emotions, rivalry, women, chaos, humor, jjk, jujutsu Kaisen.
